visual_summary: An immense, excavated stone amphitheater located within an ancient ruined Martian city. The space is a cavernous subterranean hollow featuring tiered rock seating designed to hold thousands of spectators. At its center lies a gladiatorial combat pit that serves as the primary anchor for action.
layout_notes: Large-scale subterranean arena with central combat pit and peripheral tunnels/cells.
lighting: Harsh, dramatic lighting; shadows cast by rock walls with torchlight presence and darkness in peripheral areas.
mood: High atmospheric tension driven by the roar of a bloodthirsty crowd.
constraints: Must maintain immense scale for thousands of spectators
Lighting must emphasize shadows cast by surrounding rock walls
unresolved_ambiguities: Specific architectural details of the "ancient ruined Martian city" are not defined beyond being the location.
Exact light sources (beyond implied torchlight) are unspecified.
